title: How to check if a value exists in a list
task: Test whether a value appears anywhere in a column — membership, allow-lists, validation.
keywords: check if value in list excel

excel.note: Returns TRUE/FALSE. Wrap in IF for custom labels.

explanation: COUNTIF counts the matches and the >0 turns it into a clean TRUE/FALSE — "banana" is in the list. This beats the MATCH/ISNUMBER combination for readability and the two behave identically for exact values. Caveats worth knowing: COUNTIF is case-insensitive, and if the probe value contains * or ? they act as wildcards — use SUMPRODUCT(--EXACT(...)) when case or literal symbols matter.
